session.user:
Run ruff check and ruff format on the codebase at /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what you find.
Run: `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` from the project root.
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff check and ruff format commands to report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting check on entire codebase

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check without modifying files

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
## Results
**ruff check failed: 7 issues found**
All violations are line-length issues (E501 - lines exceeding 100 character limit):

- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_list.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py`
Overall: 1659 files are already properly formatted; only these 3 test files have formatting issues that need attention.
